mapper.select: SELECT project_type AS typeValue, COUNT(*) AS projectCount, ROUND( COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM declare_hospital WHERE project_type BETWEEN 1 AND 6 ), 0), 1 ) AS percentage FROM declare_hospital WHERE project_type BETWEEN 1 AND 6 GROUP BY project_type ORDER BY project_type
SELECT province_code AS provinceId, MAX(province_name) AS provinceName, COUNT(*) AS projectCount FROM declare_hospital GROUP BY province_code ORDER BY projectCount DESC
